emails.subject: Master Swap Worksheets--Barrick Gold Corp. & IGI Resources Inc.
emails.subject_base: Master Swap Worksheets--Barrick Gold Corp. & IGI Resources Inc.
emails.body: Master Swap Worksheets--Barrick Gold Corp. IGI Resources Inc. Attached below are two seperate Credit Worksheets for the subject counterparties. Both requests are from Caroline Abramo who trades in New York and Houston (You can reach her at 212-702-3910 or x3-6619). She will be visiting the counterparties soon and would like to have sent them the documents within the month. Thanks, Veronica Espinoza x6-6002
